response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all essential for this role. His background is overwhelmingly in web, mobile, and general-purpose software using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of embedded firmware or switch product development.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Proven track record in complex systems and performance-critical applications
concerns: No C programming experience in UNIX/embedded context as required
Zero evidence of Linux kernel analysis or security feature implementation
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement
